management.office_hours: Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM

administrator.name: Jorge Torres
administrator.title: Administrator
administrator.answer_en: Jorge Torres is the Administrator at BrickellHouse.
administrator.answer_es: Jorge Torres es el Administrador de BrickellHouse.
administrator.rule: This is approved public staff knowledge. The shared Management email may be provided, but no personal contact information may be inferred or disclosed.

general_manager.name: Buriel Noel
general_manager.title: General Manager
general_manager.answer_en: Buriel Noel is the General Manager.
general_manager.answer_es: Buriel Noel es el General Manager.
general_manager.rule: This is approved public staff knowledge. Do not provide personal phone, personal email, address, or private staff details.

caleb.title: Assistant Manager
caleb.answer_en: Caleb is the Assistant Manager at BrickellHouse.
caleb.answer_es: Caleb es el Assistant Manager de BrickellHouse.
caleb.rule: Mention Caleb by name only when needed or when specifically asked. Do not provide personal information.

general_help_en: What do you need help with?
unsure_route: If unsure, route to admin@brickellhouse.net or the Front Desk depending on the issue.
response_es: Responde en español con el contacto exacto solicitado y no agregues departamentos que no fueron pedidos.
